properties.body:
WESTERN SOUTH ATLANTIC.
URUGUAY.
1. SEISMIC SURVEY 14 AND 15 JAN BY M/V WG TASMAN
   TOWING 12 8000 METER LONG CABLES
   ALONG TRACKLINE BETWEEN
   35-56.72S 052-29.32W AND 36-38.60S 051-48.43W.
   NINE MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 69/13, 118/13.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 16 JAN 13.
